feat.name: Tikling Bird Twirl
feat.text: You trained your footwork by dancing to music between snapping bamboo poles, and your increased mobility helps you succeed when hunting dangerous beasts or fighting multiple opponents. This style of bobbing and weaving and alternating fight and flight disorients your enemies and allows you to choose your engagements. After resolving your attack, you can immediately Step, Stride, or Swim.

traits.name: Sarangay
traits.text: Powerful carabao-headed warriors who live on the isles of Minata. Known for the magical gems in their foreheads that are said to contain their souls.

feat.trigger: You roll a critical hit on a melee Strike against an enemy.
